kitchen.name: Kitchen
kitchen.description: A dim farmhouse kitchen. A heavy wooden table sits in the middle of the room, and a rug lies rumpled near the corner. A flour barrel stands against the wall. A stairway leads down into darkness.

cellar.name: Cellar
cellar.description: A cold, damp cellar carved from raw earth. Water drips somewhere in the dark. An iron door, thick with rust, is set into the far wall.

vault.name: Vault
vault.description: A small stone vault, untouched for decades. A stone altar stands in the center of the room, its surface carved with faded runes.

table.name: table
table.description: A heavy wooden table, scarred from years of use.

lamp.name: brass lamp
lamp.description: A sturdy brass lamp, the kind that could burn for hours on a little oil.

rug.name: rug
rug.description: A rumpled old rug. Something might be under it.

barrel.name: flour barrel
barrel.description: A wooden barrel half full of flour. Worth a search.

brass_key.name: brass key
brass_key.description: A small brass key, tarnished with age.

iron_door.name: iron door
iron_door.description: A heavy iron door, thick with rust. A keyhole is set just below the handle.

altar.name: stone altar
altar.description: A stone altar carved with faded runes. It looks like it was built to hold something precious.

crown.name: jeweled crown
crown.description: A golden crown, set with jewels that catch even the faintest light.

effects.print: You plunge your hands into the flour and feel something hard. A small brass key!
You shove the rug aside. Nothing is hidden underneath after all -- but the flour barrel in the corner looks worth a search.
You pull the rug back. Nothing underneath -- but that flour barrel might reward a closer look.
Taken. The crown is surprisingly heavy with gold.
You set the jeweled crown upon the stone altar. The runes flare briefly with pale light, then go still.

effects.win: The altar accepts your offering. Somewhere deep in the earth, an old debt is repaid.

effects.print: Somewhere below, you hear water dripping.
